tasks.title: Create My Products Page
tasks.description: Develop a responsive "My Products" page that displays a user's product catalog with filtering, sorting, and basic CRUD operations.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:
1. Create a new React component 'MyProductsPage' with responsive layout using CSS Grid/Flexbox
2. Implement product listing with card-based design showing:
   - Product image
   - Product name
   - Price
   - Stock status
   - Edit/Delete buttons
3. Add filtering functionality:
   - By category
   - By price range
   - By stock status
4. Implement sorting options:
   - By name
   - By price
   - By date added
5. Add CRUD operations:
   - Create new product form
   - Edit product modal
   - Delete confirmation dialog
6. Implement pagination or infinite scroll
7. Add loading states and error handling
8. Ensure mobile-responsive design
9. Implement search functionality

Technical considerations:
- Use React hooks for state management
- Implement proper form validation
- Add optimistic updates for better UX
- Include proper error boundaries
- Use proper accessibility attributes
- Implement proper image lazy loading
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Tests:
   - Test all CRUD operations
   - Verify filter functionality
   - Test sorting mechanisms
   - Validate form submissions
   - Test error handling

2. Integration Tests:
   - Verify API integration
   - Test data persistence
   - Validate state updates

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Verify responsive design on multiple screen sizes
   - Test keyboard navigation
   - Verify all interactive elements are accessible
   - Test loading states
   - Verify proper error messages

4. Performance Testing:
   - Test with large datasets
   - Verify pagination/infinite scroll performance
   - Check image loading optimization

5. Cross-browser Testing:
   - Test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari
   - Verify mobile browser compatibility

subtasks.title: Implement Basic Product List Component with Grid Layout
subtasks.description: Create the foundational MyProductsPage component with a responsive grid layout and basic product card display
subtasks.details:
1. Create MyProductsPage.tsx and MyProductsPage.css files
2. Implement CSS Grid/Flexbox layout structure
3. Create ProductCard component with image, name, price, stock display
4. Add basic responsive breakpoints
5. Implement image lazy loading using IntersectionObserver
6. Add loading skeleton states
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for component rendering, snapshot tests for different screen sizes, visual regression testing for responsive layout

subtasks.title: Add Product Filtering and Sorting Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement filter controls and sorting options for the product list
subtasks.details:
1. Create FilterControls component with category, price range, and stock status filters
2. Implement sorting dropdown with name/price/date options
3. Add filter/sort state management using React hooks
4. Create utility functions for filtering and sorting logic
5. Add URL query param sync for filter/sort state
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for filter/sort logic, integration tests for state management, URL param handling tests

subtasks.title: Implement Product CRUD Operations
subtasks.description: Create forms and modals for adding, editing, and deleting products
subtasks.details:
1. Create AddProductForm component with validation
2. Implement EditProductModal with form reuse
3. Add DeleteConfirmationDialog component
4. Implement optimistic updates for all operations
5. Add error handling and success notifications
6. Include form validation using a form library
subtasks.testStrategy: Form validation tests, API integration tests, error handling tests, optimistic update tests

subtasks.title: Add Pagination and Search Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement product list pagination/infinite scroll and search capability
subtasks.details:
1. Implement pagination controls or infinite scroll logic
2. Add search input with debounce
3. Create search results handling
4. Implement proper loading states for pagination/search
5. Add error handling for failed API requests
subtasks.testStrategy: Pagination logic tests, search functionality tests, scroll handling tests, loading state tests

subtasks.title: Enhance Accessibility and Error Handling
subtasks.description: Implement accessibility features and proper error boundaries
subtasks.details:
1. Add ARIA labels and roles
2. Implement keyboard navigation
3. Create error boundary components
4. Add focus management for modals
5. Implement screen reader announcements
6. Add proper alt texts and aria-live regions
subtasks.testStrategy: Accessibility testing with screen readers, keyboard navigation tests, error boundary tests

tasks.title: Implement Website Color Scheme Configuration System
tasks.description: Create a system that allows administrators to customize the website's color scheme through the admin settings page, including database storage for color preferences and real-time UI updates.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. Database Changes:
   - Create new 'color_schemes' table with fields:
     * id (primary key)
     * primary_color (hex code)
     * secondary_color (hex code)
     * accent_color (hex code)
     * text_color (hex code)
     * is_active (boolean)
     * created_at, updated_at timestamps

2. Backend Implementation:
   - Create RESTful API endpoints for color scheme CRUD operations
   - Implement color scheme validation (valid hex codes)
   - Add caching mechanism for active color scheme
   - Create migration scripts for database changes

3. Frontend Implementation:
   - Add new section to admin settings page
   - Create color picker component with hex code input
   - Implement live preview functionality
   - Add color scheme form with fields:
     * Primary color picker
     * Secondary color picker
     * Accent color picker
     * Text color picker
   - Add save/reset buttons
   - Implement real-time preview using CSS variables

4. Integration:
   - Create CSS variable system for colors
   - Implement theme provider component
   - Add color scheme loading on application startup
   - Create fallback default theme

5. Performance Considerations:
   - Implement debouncing for color changes
   - Add color scheme caching
   - Optimize theme switching to prevent flickering
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test color scheme validation
   - Verify hex code formatting
   - Test database operations
   - Validate API endpoints
   - Test theme provider component
   - Verify color picker component

2. Integration Testing:
   - Verify color scheme persistence
   - Test real-time preview functionality
   - Validate theme switching
   - Test caching mechanism
   - Verify CSS variable updates

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Verify color picker usability
   - Test responsive design
   - Check color contrast accessibility
   - Validate live preview accuracy
   - Test across different browsers

4. Performance Testing:
   - Measure theme switching performance
   - Test caching effectiveness
   - Verify load times with different color schemes

5. Security Testing:
   - Verify admin-only access
   - Test input sanitization
   - Validate API endpoint security

subtasks.title: Use MCP server to create new columns in the admin_settings table for the color options
subtasks.description: Update the admin_settings table in the database to add columns for storing color scheme options. Use the MCP server to manage the migration and ensure the new columns are accessible for settings management.

subtasks.title: Create settings for color picker on the /admin settings page in a new block in the settings form
subtasks.description: Implement a new UI block in the admin settings page that allows admins to pick and save color scheme options. Integrate the color picker with the new database columns and ensure changes are reflected in the website's appearance.

tasks.title: Update Pricing Page UI and Business Logic
tasks.description: Implement UI enhancements and business logic updates to the pricing page according to specified requirements, incorporating the new color scheme system for consistent styling.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. UI Components Updates:
   - Create/update PricingPage component using React and TypeScript
   - Implement responsive pricing tier cards using CSS Grid/Flexbox
   - Add interactive elements (hover states, selection indicators)
   - Integrate with color scheme system for dynamic styling
   - Implement price toggle switch (monthly/annual)

2. Business Logic Implementation:
   - Create pricing calculation service
   - Implement discount logic for annual subscriptions
   - Add feature comparison matrix
   - Implement tier selection and validation logic
   - Add price formatting utilities with currency support

3. State Management:
   - Set up Redux/Context store for pricing state
   - Implement actions and reducers for price updates
   - Add selectors for derived pricing calculations

4. API Integration:
   - Create API service for fetching pricing data
   - Implement error handling and loading states
   - Add caching layer for pricing information

5. Accessibility Considerations:
   - Ensure ARIA labels for interactive elements
   - Implement keyboard navigation
   - Add screen reader support for pricing information
   - Ensure proper contrast ratios with dynamic colors
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test pricing calculation functions
   - Verify discount calculations
   - Test currency formatting
   - Validate tier comparison logic
   - Test state management functions
   - Verify color scheme integration

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test API integration
   - Verify state updates
   - Test pricing data flow
   - Validate color scheme updates
   - Test responsive behavior

3. E2E Testing:
   - Verify complete user flow
   - Test tier selection process
   - Validate payment flow integration
   - Test monthly/annual toggle
   - Verify mobile responsiveness

4. Accessibility Testing:
   - Run automated accessibility audits
   - Test screen reader compatibility
   - Verify keyboard navigation
   - Check color contrast compliance

5. Performance Testing:
   - Measure component render times
   - Test pricing calculation performance
   - Verify API response handling

subtasks.title: Show "Start Trial" button when product includes a free trial
subtasks.description: Update pricing page logic so that if the product has a freeTrialDays value > 0, the main CTA button label is "Start Trial".

subtasks.title: Display "No Credit Card Required" text for trials without card requirement
subtasks.description: When free trial does not need credit card, insert supportive text below CTA button saying "No Credit Card Required".

subtasks.title: Show "Subscribe" button when term is monthly or yearly and no trial
subtasks.description: If product has no free trial and pricing term is monthly or yearly, label CTA button as "Subscribe".

subtasks.title: Show "Purchase" button when term is one-time
subtasks.description: If pricing term is one-time purchase and no free trial, label CTA button as "Purchase".

subtasks.title: Style pricing page tabs with dynamic border and colors
subtasks.description: Add #d8d8d8 1px border to tabs; active tab uses primary theme color as border-bottom/background, inactive tabs use header background color.

tasks.title: Implement Admin Options for Pricing Page Customization
tasks.description: Add new administrative controls in the admin settings to customize Pricing Page content, including configurable headline, description, and FAQ sections with corresponding database storage and front-end implementation.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. Database Updates:
   - Add new columns to appropriate table:
     * pricing_headline (varchar)
     * pricing_description (text)
     * pricing_faq (json/text for FAQ items)
   - Create migration script
   - Update database schema documentation

2. Admin Settings UI Changes:
   - Create new "Pricing Page Content" section above Theme Colors
   - Implement form components:
     * Text input for headline
     * Rich text editor for description
     * Dynamic FAQ editor with add/remove capability
   - Add form validation
   - Implement save/reset functionality
   - Update admin-settings.mdc documentation

3. Backend Implementation:
   - Create/update API endpoints:
     * GET /api/admin/pricing-content
     * PUT /api/admin/pricing-content
   - Implement input sanitization
   - Add validation middleware
   - Create service layer for content management

4. Pricing Page Updates:
   - Modify PricingPage component to fetch custom content
   - Implement conditional rendering:
     * Use custom content when available
     * Fall back to defaults when not set
   - Ensure responsive design maintenance
   - Remove hardcoded text
   - Update styling to maintain consistency

5. State Management:
   - Add new state slices for pricing content
   - Implement content caching strategy
   - Create actions/reducers for content updates
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test database migrations
   - Verify API endpoint functionality:
     * Test successful content retrieval
     * Validate content updates
     * Check error handling
   - Test form validation
   - Verify state management
   - Test conditional rendering logic

2. Integration Testing:
   - Verify end-to-end content update flow
   - Test database persistence
   - Validate admin settings integration
   - Check pricing page rendering with:
     * Default content
     * Custom content
     * Partial custom content
   - Verify caching mechanism

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Validate admin form usability
   - Check responsive design
   - Verify content preview functionality
   - Test FAQ editor interactions
   - Ensure consistent styling

4. Documentation Testing:
   - Verify admin-settings.mdc accuracy
   - Check API documentation
   - Validate database schema docs

subtasks.title: Create Database Migration for New Admin Settings
subtasks.description: Create and execute database migration to add new columns for pricing page customization in admin_settings table
subtasks.details: Create migration file adding columns: pricing_headline (varchar(255)), pricing_description (text), pricing_faq (jsonb). Include up/down migrations. Update schema documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify migration runs successfully, columns are created with correct types, and rollback works properly

subtasks.title: Implement Admin UI Section for Pricing Content
subtasks.description: Add new section in admin settings for pricing page customization with form fields
subtasks.details: Create new section above Theme Colors. Add text input for headline, rich text editor for description, and dynamic FAQ editor with add/remove functionality. Implement form validation and save/reset buttons.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test form validation, field interactions, and proper state management

subtasks.title: Create Backend API Endpoints
subtasks.description: Implement API endpoints for managing pricing page content
subtasks.details: Create GET and PUT endpoints at /api/admin/pricing-content. Implement input validation, sanitization, and error handling. Create service layer for content management.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test validation and sanitization. Integration test API endpoints.

subtasks.title: Update Pricing Page Component
subtasks.description: Modify pricing page to use custom content from admin settings
subtasks.details: Update component to fetch and display custom content. Implement fallback to defaults when custom content is null. Remove hardcoded trial and setup fee text.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test conditional rendering with both custom and default content

subtasks.title: Implement FAQ Section Management
subtasks.description: Create dynamic FAQ management system with repeater fields
subtasks.details: Implement repeater field component for FAQ items. Add question/answer fields. Store as JSON. Update display component to use custom FAQs or fall back to defaults.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test FAQ CRUD operations, JSON storage/retrieval, and display rendering

subtasks.title: Update Documentation and Perform Final Testing
subtasks.description: Update admin-settings.mdc documentation and conduct comprehensive testing
subtasks.details: Update documentation with new settings section details. Test entire workflow from admin settings to frontend display. Verify responsive design and styling consistency.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end testing of complete feature. Verify documentation accuracy.

tasks.title: Implement Customizable Footer with Admin Settings
tasks.description: Develop a responsive three-column footer with administrative controls for customizing colors, site name, and column content through the admin settings interface.
tasks.details:
Implementation steps:

1. Database Updates:
   - Add new columns to settings table:
     * footer_background_color (varchar)
     * footer_text_color (varchar)
     * footer_link_color (varchar)
     * site_name (varchar)
     * footer_column_1_content (text)
     * footer_column_2_content (text)
     * footer_column_3_content (text)
   - Create migration script
   - Update database schema documentation

2. Admin Settings UI:
   - Create new "Footer Settings" section in admin panel
   - Implement color picker components for:
     * Background color
     * Text color
     * Link color
   - Add site name input field
   - Create rich text editors for each footer column
   - Implement preview functionality
   - Add form validation and error handling

3. Footer Component Implementation:
   - Create new React FooterComponent using TypeScript
   - Implement responsive three-column layout using CSS Grid/Flexbox
   - Add breakpoints for mobile responsiveness:
     * Desktop: three columns
     * Tablet: two columns
     * Mobile: single column
   - Create styled-components/CSS modules for footer styling
   - Implement dynamic color application using CSS variables
   - Add sanitization for custom HTML content

4. Integration:
   - Create API endpoints for footer settings CRUD operations
   - Implement footer settings context/store
   - Add footer component to app layout
   - Set up real-time preview in admin panel
   - Implement caching for footer settings

5. Documentation:
   - Update admin documentation with new footer customization options
   - Add technical documentation for footer component
   - Include usage guidelines for HTML content
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test footer settings validation
   - Verify color format validation
   - Test HTML content sanitization
   - Validate responsive layout calculations
   - Test footer component rendering
   - Verify settings persistence
   - Test context/store functionality

2. Integration Testing:
   - Verify API endpoint functionality
   - Test settings update flow
   - Validate real-time preview
   - Check cache invalidation
   - Test color scheme integration
   - Verify responsive behavior across breakpoints

3. UI/UX Testing:
   - Validate responsive layout on different devices
   - Test accessibility compliance:
     * Color contrast ratios
     * Screen reader compatibility
     * Keyboard navigation
   - Verify custom HTML rendering
   - Test admin interface usability
   - Check cross-browser compatibility

4. Security Testing:
   - Validate HTML sanitization
   - Test XSS prevention
   - Verify admin access controls
   - Check input validation

subtasks.title: Create Database Migration for Footer Settings
subtasks.description: Create and execute migration script to add new footer-related columns to admin_settings table
subtasks.details: Create migration file adding columns: footer_background_color, dark_footer_background_color, footer_text_color, dark_footer_text_color, footer_link_color, dark_footer_link_color, site_name, footer_html_one, footer_html_two. Set appropriate default values and constraints. Update database schema documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify migration up/down scripts, check column types and constraints, validate default values

subtasks.title: Implement Theme Colors Section in Admin UI
subtasks.description: Add color picker components for footer-specific colors in Theme Colors section
subtasks.details: Add color picker components for both light and dark theme footer colors (background, text, links). Implement live preview functionality. Include validation for color values. Add save/reset functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test color picker functionality, value persistence, theme switching, and validation

subtasks.title: Create Site Options Section in Admin UI
subtasks.description: Implement new Site Options section with site name configuration
subtasks.details: Create new admin UI section for Site Options. Add input field for site name with validation. Implement save functionality. Add character limit and validation messages.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test input validation, character limits, persistence of values

subtasks.title: Develop Footer Options Section in Admin UI
subtasks.description: Create Footer Options section with WYSIWYG editors for custom content
subtasks.details: Implement Footer Options section with two WYSIWYG editors for footer_html_one and footer_html_two. Add HTML sanitization. Include preview functionality. Implement save/reset capabilities.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test WYSIWYG functionality, HTML sanitization, content persistence

subtasks.title: Create Responsive Footer Component
subtasks.description: Build responsive footer component using new settings and styling
subtasks.details: Create React footer component with TypeScript. Implement responsive 3-column layout using CSS Grid/Flexbox. Add breakpoints for mobile/tablet. Integrate theme colors and custom content. Implement copyright section with dynamic site name.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test responsive behavior, theme switching, content rendering, accessibility

subtasks.title: Integrate Footer into Application
subtasks.description: Integrate new footer component into main application layout
subtasks.details: Add footer component to main layout. Implement context/store for footer settings. Set up API endpoints for settings CRUD operations. Add caching for footer settings. Update header component to use dynamic site name.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test integration points, API endpoints, caching mechanism, overall layout

subtasks.title: Update Technical Documentation
subtasks.description: Update all relevant documentation with new footer functionality
subtasks.details: Update @admin-settings.mdc and @1-supabase-database-setup.mdc with new fields and sections. Document footer component usage, theming system, and HTML content guidelines. Include updated table schema and API endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify documentation accuracy, completeness, and clarity through peer review
